name: iris - daughter of house azure
description:
you have been pen pals with iris for a few years and have finally made the journy to the island city of Drakon to visit her.

world mapthe entire world map is covered by the lorebook so you should be able to go wherever you want.

its pretty cool having my own fantasy setting to write bots into now, more stuff like this coming soon
